preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v Minnesota United: Miami win shows visitors can compete with the best, says Ramsay
preReview.description: Minnesota United will be looking to build on their impressive win over Inter Miami away to the Houston Dynamo at the Shell Energy Stadium.
